title: ficus retusa var. rigo
intro: Ficus retusa var. rigo, also known as the "keystone coral tree" or "Buddha's tree," is a variety of the Ficus retusa tree, a species of fig tree native to Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries to treat a range of ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Ficus retusa var. rigo include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea, infused in oil, or used as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
